15:1:1.m: Individual letters Alif-Lam-Ra (opening of سورة الحجر)

15:2:5.m: if (introducing an impossible or unlikely wish)

لَوْ: if (introducing an impossible or unlikely wish)

15:3:1.m: leave them! (command to let them be, connected to يَأْكُلُوا۟)

15:3:2.m: let them eat (after ذَرْهُمْ - leave them)

15:5:4.m: any community (possessed by something in أَجَلَهَا)

15:6:2.m: O you! (calling out to get attention)

15:6:4.m: was sent down repeatedly (referring to الذِّكْرُ - the reminder)

15:6:8.m: surely one whose mind is hidden/covered (indefinite)

15:8:3.m: the angels (object of نُنَزِّلُ - we send down)

15:8:5.m: with the truth (describes how نُنَزِّلُ/we send down is done)

15:8:8.m: in that case/therefore (connects to مَا كَانُوٓا۟)

15:9:2.m: we (subject of نَزَّلْنَا - we sent down)

15:9:5.m: and indeed we (the subject of لَحٰفِظُونَ - guardians)

15:12:1.m: like that, in this way (connected to نَسْلُكُهُۥ)

15:13:2.m: they believe/trust (لَا - they do not believe in it)

15:13:6.m: the established way/practice (subject of خَلَتْ - has passed)

15:14:4.m: a door (object of فَتَحْنَا - we opened)

15:14:8.m: in it (referring to the gate/باب mentioned earlier)

هِ: it (referring to the gate/باب mentioned earlier)

15:16:7.m: for the people who look carefully

15:17:4.m: a rebellious one (being described by رَّجِيمٍ)

15:18:5.m: and then he made him follow

15:19:2.m: we stretched it (referring to الأرض/the Earth)

15:19:4.m: in it (referring to الْأَرْضَ - the earth)

15:20:3.m: in it (feminine, referring to the earth/places mentioned)

هَا: it (feminine, referring to the earth/places mentioned)

15:22:2.m: the winds (object of أَرْسَلْنَا - we sent)

15:22:7.m: water (as the object being sent down)

15:22:8.m: so we made you all drink it

15:23:2.m: indeed/verily we (subject of نُحْىِۦ - we give life)

15:24:3.m: those who go/come forward (object of عَلِمْنَا - we knew)

15:24:7.m: those who stay behind (object of عَلِمْنَا - we know)

15:26:5.m: dry clay that makes a sound when tapped (owned, after مِن)

صَلْصٰل: dry clay that makes a sound when tapped

15:27:1.m: and the jinn (object of خَلَقْنٰهُ/we created)

15:27:3.m: from (showing what the jinn were created from)

15:28:2.m: he said (subject of لِلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ - to the angels)

15:28:3.m: your Lord (who said to the angels)

15:28:4.m: to/for the angels (who Allah speaks to)

15:28:9.m: of a clay that rings (when struck)

15:29:8.m: to/for him (connected to فَقَعُوا۟ - fall down)

15:30:1.m: so/then he bowed down in worship

15:30:4.m: all together (describing the angels in فَسَجَدَ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةُ)

15:31:2.m: Satan (as the subject of أَبَىٰٓ - he refused)

ن: connects what comes before with what follows

15:32:2.m: O Iblis! (being addressed by Allah in قَالَ - He said)

15:32:5.m: that not (introduces why إِبْلِيسُ is being questioned)

15:33:4.m: that I prostrate (to لِبَشَرٍ/to a human)

15:33:8.m: of dry clay that makes a ringing sound when struck (possessed by مِن)

صَلْصٰل: dry clay that makes a ringing sound when struck

15:33:11.m: of altered black mud that has been perfectly shaped/molded

15:34:5.m: an outcast, one who is driven away

15:35:1.m: and indeed (emphasizes عَلَيْكَ ٱللَّعْنَةَ - the curse is upon you)

15:36:3.m: so give me time! (as a command to Allah)

15:37:4.m: the ones who are given time (plural, object of مِنَ)

15:39:4.m: you led me astray (said by Iblis to Allah)

15:39:5.m: I will most certainly decorate/make beautiful (said by Iblis to Allah)

15:39:9.m: And I will surely lead them astray

15:39:10.m: all together (as the object being acted upon by لَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ - I will surely mislead them)

ينَ: (as the object being acted upon by لَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ - I will surely mislead them)

15:40:3.m: from among them (referring to عِبَادَكَ - Your servants)

15:42:4.m: for you (when speaking to one male)

15:43:2.m: hell (as the destination of أَجْمَعِينَ - all of them)

15:44:5.m: a door (part of سَبْعَةُ أَبْوٰبٍ - seven doors)

15:44:6.m: from them (connected to جُزْءٌ - a portion)

15:44:7.m: a part (that is divided/assigned in مَّقْسُومٌ)

15:45:2.m: the God-fearing ones (who are إِنَّ in gardens and springs)

15:46:2.m: with peace (describing how to enter in ٱدْخُلُوهَا)

15:47:6.m: any hatred (that is in صُدُورِهِم their hearts)

15:47:10.m: facing each other (plural, describing the brothers on thrones)

ينَ: plural, describing the brothers on thrones

15:49:3.m: that I/indeed I (introducing Allah's statement أَنَا ٱلْغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ)

15:49:6.m: The Intensely Merciful One (one of Allah's names, subject of the sentence)

رَّحِيمُ: Intensely Merciful One (one of Allah's names, subject of the sentence)

15:51:1.m: and tell them! (as a command) (about ضَيْفِ إِبْرٰهِيمَ)

15:51:4.m: Abraham (object of عَن ضَيْفِ - about the guests of)

15:52:4.m: and/so they said (after دَخَلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِ - they entered upon him)

15:52:5.m: peace (as a greeting to عَلَيْهِ - to him)

15:53:6.m: with a boy/youth (object of نُبَشِّرُكَ - we give you glad tidings of)

15:53:7.m: one who is deeply knowledgeable (describing غُلٰمٍ - a boy/son)

15:54:1.m: he said (asking about the good news they brought)

15:54:2.m: did you all give good news to me?

15:54:6.m: the old age (specific old age being discussed)

15:54:7.m: so with what (are you giving good news?)

15:55:2.m: we gave you good news (to Ibrahim)

15:55:3.m: with the truth (they gave good news to you)

15:55:7.m: the ones who lose hope completely (after مِنَ)

15:56:8.m: those who go astray (in accusative case)

15:57:5.m: the messengers (those being addressed in this ayah)

15:58:3.m: we were sent (to قَوْمٍ مُّجْرِمِينَ - a criminal people)

15:59:3.m: Lot's (family of Lot in آلَ لُوطٍ)

15:59:6.m: all together (object of لَمُنَجُّوهُمْ - we will save them)

ينَ: (object of لَمُنَجُّوهُمْ - we will save them)

15:60:6.m: the ones who stay behind (after لَمِنَ)

15:65:3.m: with a piece (of الَّيْلِ - the night)

15:65:6.m: and follow intensely! (command to one person)

15:65:9.m: he turns himself around (in negative command with لا)

15:66:4.m: the matter/affair (object of قَضَيْنَا - We decreed)

15:67:4.m: they seek good news for themselves

15:68:5.m: so/then don't (connected to قَالَ - he said)

15:70:2.m: and did not? (questioning the people who said قَالُوٓا۟)

15:71:2.m: these ones (subject of قَالَ - he said)

15:72:4.m: their state of intoxication/confusion (while they wander blindly in يَعْمَهُونَ)

15:74:2.m: its high part (acted on by جَعَلْنَا/we made)

15:74:4.m: and we caused to rain down

15:74:6.m: stones (as the object being rained down)

15:74:7.m: from/of (describing what the stones are made of)

15:75:4.m: surely signs (for لِّلْمُتَوَسِّمِينَ - for those who read the signs)

15:75:5.m: for the ones who look carefully for signs

مُتَوَسِّم: ones who look carefully for signs

15:76:1.m: and indeed it/she (referring to the path/road mentioned after)

15:76:2.m: surely/indeed on a path (connected to مُّقِيمٍ - established)

15:78:4.m: of the thicket (possessed by أَصْحٰبُ - companions)

15:80:2.m: he strongly denied/rejected (أَصْحٰبُ ٱلْحِجْرِ denied ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ)

15:80:4.m: the rocky valley (of the people of Thamud)

15:81:4.m: away from them (referring to آيٰتِنَا - Our signs)

15:81:5.m: those who turn away (predicate of كَانُوا)

15:82:2.m: they carve/are carving (from the mountains houses)

15:82:5.m: houses (as objects being carved from mountains)

15:83:1.m: then she/it seized them (subject: the blast/cry)

15:85:4.m: and the earth (as object of خَلَقْنَا - we created)

15:86:5.m: The All-Knowing (attribute of Allah mentioned after هُوَ)

15:87:5.m: the oft-repeated verses (referring to the seven verses of Surah Al-Fatiha)

15:87:6.m: and the Quran (object being given along with سَبْعًا)

15:88:3.m: your two eyes (object of لَا تَمُدَّنَّ - do not extend)

15:90:4.m: the ones who divide for themselves

15:91:1.m: those who (referring to the people who divided the Quran into parts)

نَ: (referring to the people who divided the Quran into parts)

15:91:3.m: The Quran (as the object of جَعَلُوا - they made)

َ: (as the object of جَعَلُوا - they made)

15:94:1.m: so declare openly! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to proclaim the message)

15:94:2.m: with what (that is commanded in تُؤْمَرُ)

15:95:1.m: indeed we (subject of كَفَيْنٰكَ - we sufficed you)

15:95:3.m: the mockers (object of كَفَيْنٰكَ - We protected you from)

15:96:2.m: they make/set/place (referring to those who in ٱلَّذِينَ)

15:96:5.m: a god (object of يَجْعَلُونَ - they take/make)

15:97:3.m: indeed you (object of نَعْلَمُ - we know)

15:97:4.m: he becomes distressed (by what they say)

15:97:5.m: your chest (subject of يَضِيقُ - becomes tight)

15:98:4.m: and be! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)

15:99:3.m: until (connects to يَأْتِيَكَ - comes to you)

15:99:5.m: the absolute certainty (subject of يَأْتِيَكَ - comes to you)

ُ: subject of يَأْتِيَكَ - comes to you
